title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Plumbing Repair Signals Consumer Stress Rebound
thesis: An uptick in DIY plumbing repair searches indicates rising household maintenance stress, often preceding increased discretionary spending on home goods. Consumer discretionary benefits as stressed consumers invest in home repairs and upgrades.
signal_logic: Enter long XLY if weekly Google Trends index for 'DIY plumbing repair' rises 15% week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLY if weekly Google Trends index for 'DIY plumbing repair' rises 15% week-over-week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if index drops 10% week-over-week
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly search interest for home repair topics fluctuates regularly with seasonal and stress-driven spikes.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY plumbing repair' signals consumer stress rebound
schema.behavior: An uptick in DIY plumbing repair searches indicates rising household maintenance stress, often preceding increased discretionary spending on home goods.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary benefits as stressed consumers invest in home repairs and upgrades.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if weekly Google Trends index for 'DIY plumbing repair' rises 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if index drops 10% week-over-week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly search interest for home repair topics fluctuates regularly with seasonal and stress-driven spikes.

title: Daily Spike In Political Insider Filings For Financial Sector Executives Signals Volatility
thesis: Sudden increase in insider selling or buying among financial sector executives often precedes short-term sector volatility. Insider selling spikes can signal expected headwinds or risk in financials.
signal_logic: Enter short XLF if daily insider filings for financial execs increase by 30% over 5-day average with net selling >50%
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLF if daily insider filings for financial execs increase by 30% over 5-day average with net selling >50% Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if insider buying overtakes selling
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use SEC insider filings data via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider activity fluctuates frequently with market conditions and regulatory news.

schema.idea: Daily spike in political insider filings for financial sector executives signals volatility
schema.behavior: Sudden increase in insider selling or buying among financial sector executives often precedes short-term sector volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling spikes can signal expected headwinds or risk in financials.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if daily insider filings for financial execs increase by 30% over 5-day average with net selling >50%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if insider buying overtakes selling

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider activity fluctuates frequently with market conditions and regulatory news.

entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLF if daily RSS news counts on labor union contract talks rise 40% above 10-day average Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if news counts fall below 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor contract negotiations news often intensifies and fades repeatedly during negotiation windows.

title: Daily Jump In Freight Rail Carload Volumes Signals Industrial Rebound
thesis: Sudden daily increases in rail carloads indicate inventory restocking and industrial activity acceleration. Industrial sector benefits from increased freight throughput signaling production growth.
data_sources: Freight rail carload volume daily reports
signal_logic: Enter long XLI if daily rail carloads increase by more than 3% versus prior day
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLI if daily rail carloads increase by more than 3% versus prior day Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if daily volume drops by 2% for 2 consecutive days

implementation_notes: Use Freight rail carload volume daily reports via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily freight volumes regularly fluctuate with economic cycles and supply chain shifts.
